etymology.description: Depicts a picture of a cong (琮), a sort of ritual jade totem -> variant form of 玉(玉) (yù, 'jade')
etymology.interpretation: This character is an ancient representation of a cong, a ritual object made of jade, which helps to distinguish it from similar characters like 王(王) (wáng, 'king'). It visually signifies jade, a valuable and culturally significant material in ancient China.
